# Vagabond.Common Reference

Types and helpers in `Vagabond.Common.dll`.     
**Disclaimer:** Documentation generated by an LLM.

---

## `Vagabond.Common.Enums`

### `RaidLocation`
Source: [common/Enums/RaidLocation.cs](../common/Enums/RaidLocation.cs)

`Nil, FactoryDay, FactoryNight, GroundZero, Streets, Woods, Customs, Interchange, Lighthouse, Reserve, Shoreline, Labs, Labyrinth`

`Nil` = unknown / unmapped. Use `VagabondLocations.NormaliseMapName` to convert strings.

---

## `Vagabond.Common.Definitions`

### `CustomExfil`
Source: [common/Definitions/CustomExfil.cs](../common/Definitions/CustomExfil.cs)

| Field | Type | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Identifier` | `string` | Stable internal key. Used for logs, scene names, save data. **Must be unique.** |
| `DisplayName` | `string` | Player-facing name. |
| `IsTransit` | `bool` | `false` = extract, `true` = transit. |
| `TemplateExitName` | `string?` | Existing scene exfil to clone trigger setup from. Optional. |
| `TemplateTransitId` | `int?` | Existing scene transit to clone setup from. If null, first available is used. |
| `TransitPointId` | `int?` | Runtime transit id. Must be unique per map when `IsTransit`. |
| `DestinationLocation` | `string` | EFT scene id of destination, e.g. `bigmap`. Use `VagabondLocations.RaidLocationToMapName(...)`. |
| `AccessKeysSourceLocation` | `string` | Override which map's `AccessKeys` gate this transit. Empty = use `DestinationLocation` (vanilla). |
| `Description` | `string` | Shown by transit interaction UI. |
| `EntryPoints` | `string` | Comma-separated EFT entry point names. **Ignored on extracts** — the server overwrites with the map's PMC entry points before sync. Not used by transits. See [EXFILS.md](EXFILS.md#shared-fields). |
| `Side` | `string` | `"Pmc"` (default), or as needed. |
| `ExfiltrationTime` | `float` | Timer in seconds. Default `20f`. |
| `ActivateAfterSeconds` | `int` | Default `0`. Delay before the exfil activates. |
| `IsActive` | `bool` | Default `true`. |
| `Events` | `bool` | |
| `HideIfNoKey` | `bool` | Hide transit if access key not on player. |
| `X / Y / Z` | `float` | World position (ignored when `HijackExfil = true`). |
| `RotationY` | `float` | Look angle when spawning here from another raid. |
| `ConnectedIdentifier` | `string?` | If incoming player came from a paired exfil with this `Identifier`, infil at this point. |
| `HijackExfil` | `bool` | Repurpose an existing scene exfil. `X/Y/Z` ignored. Only one custom exfil per template can hijack. |
| `Requirements` | `List<CustomExtractRequirementDefinition>` | See below. |

### `CustomExtractRequirementDefinition`
Source: [common/Definitions/CustomExfilRequirement.cs](../common/Definitions/CustomExfilRequirement.cs)

| Field | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `Type` | `CustomExfilRequirementType` |
| `Id` | `string` |
| `Count` | `int` (default `1`) |
| `RequiredSlot` | `string` |
| `RequirementTip` | `string` |
| `ApplyDiscount` | `bool` (default `false`) — see [`Cost` notes in EXFILS.md](EXFILS.md#cost-notes). Transit-only; ignored on extracts (vanilla v-ex pipeline always discounts). |

### `CustomExfilRequirementType`
Source: [common/Definitions/CustomExfilRequirementType.cs](../common/Definitions/CustomExfilRequirementType.cs)

`None = 0, HasItem = 1, EmptySlot = 2, Cost = 3`

| Field | Type | Notes |

| `TraderId` | `string` | EFT trader id, e.g. Fence = `579dc571d53a0658a154fbec`. |
| `Raid` | `RaidLocation` | |
| `ExfilIdentifier` | `string` | Identifier of the `CustomExfil` that grants access. |

### `TransitState`
`FromMap`, `ToMap`, `ExitName` — all `string?`.

### `HideoutState`
`Id` (`string?`), `Map` (`string?`), `X / Y / Z / R` (all `float?`).

## `Vagabond.Common.Models`

Wire shapes used by Vagabond's internal routes. Listed for reference — mods normally don't need to construct these.

| Type | Fields |
| --- | --- |
| `GetExfilDataRequest` | `Version: int` |
| `SyncExfilResponse` | `Version: int`, `CustomExfils: Dictionary<RaidLocation, Dictionary<string, List<CustomExfil>>>?` |
| `SyncStateResponse` | `ResetOnDeath, WipeFirstRaid, NewCharacter, AllowPostRaidHealing, LimitTraderMailAccess, LootStreakEnabled: bool`, `CurrentMap: string`, `QuestExfils: Dictionary<string, List<string>>`, `CustomExfils: Dictionary<RaidLocation, Dictionary<string, List<CustomExfil>>>`, `RaidFirItems: HashSet<string>`, `LootStreakMultiplier: double` (default `1.0`), `LootStreakCount: int` |
| `PlaceHideoutRequest` | `X, Y, Z, R: float`, `LocationId: string?` |
| `PlaceHideoutResponse` | `Success: bool`, `Message: string`, `CurrentRaid: string?`, `MapName: string?` |
| `ManualSpawnPoint` | `X, Y, Z, Rotation: double` |

## `Vagabond.Common.Data`

Static helpers and reference tables.

### `VagabondLocations`
Source: [common/Data/VagabondLocations.cs](../common/Data/VagabondLocations.cs)

| Member | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `RaidLocationToMapName(RaidLocation)` | First EFT scene name for a raid (e.g. `RaidLocation.Customs` → `bigmap`). |
| `NormaliseMapName(string?)` | EFT/SPT map name or template id → `RaidLocation`. Returns `Nil` if unknown. |
| `ToHumanName(RaidLocation)` | Player-facing label, e.g. `GroundZero` → `"Ground Zero"`. |
| `Locations` | `RaidLocation` → list of EFT location template ids. |
| `IdToName` | EFT template id → scene name. |
| `LookupTable` | scene name → `RaidLocation`. |
| `InverseLookupTable` | `RaidLocation` → list of scene names. |

```csharp
var sceneId = VagabondLocations.RaidLocationToMapName(RaidLocation.Labs); // "laboratory"
var raid    = VagabondLocations.NormaliseMapName("bigmap");               // RaidLocation.Customs
var label   = VagabondLocations.ToHumanName(RaidLocation.GroundZero);     // "Ground Zero"
```

### `Currencies`

`Dollar`, `Euro`, `Ruble` (string ids), `CurrencyIds` (list).

### `ForcedSpawnPointIds`
Source: [common/Data/ForcedSpawnPointIds.cs](../common/Data/ForcedSpawnPointIds.cs)

`Prefix` constant, `IsForcedSpawnId(string?)`, `Build(locationName, templateId)`.

### `ExfilQuests`
Source: [common/Data/ExfilQuests.cs](../common/Data/ExfilQuests.cs)

`Dictionary<questId, Dictionary<sceneName, List<exfilName>>>` — vanilla quest-gated exfils.

### Per-map exfil JSON

Default exfils/transits ship as JSON under `server/Config/exfils/<raid>.json` (one per `RaidLocation`). Default trader/exfil bindings live in `server/Config/trader_locations.json`. End users can edit these without recompiling — see [CONFIG.md](CONFIG.md) for the full reference. Internally the loader feeds the same `Api.AddExfils` / `Api.AddTraderLocations` path third-party mods use, so 3rd-party mods see no behavior change.

### `Messages`
Source: [common/Data/Messages.cs](../common/Data/Messages.cs)

Welcome / warning text used by the mod.
